# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://movie-fox.zappy5.app
Movie Fox curates 100+ blockbusters, acclaimed series, and hidden gems. Browse by genre — Action, Sci-Fi, Drama, Thriller and more. Watch trailers, save favorites, and discover your next obsession.

### Platform Features
https://movie-fox.zappy5.app/platform-features
Explore Movie Fox platform features: genre-driven browsing, trailer previews, star ratings, personal watchlists, and a curated library of 100+ titles. Your cinema experience, perfected.

### Library
https://movie-fox.zappy5.app/library
Browse the full Movie Fox library — 100+ curated movies and series across Action, Sci-Fi, Drama, Thriller, Horror, Fantasy, Crime, and Comedy. Find your next obsession today.

### About
https://movie-fox.zappy5.app/about
Learn about Movie Fox — our mission to curate the best in cinema, the team behind the platform, and our vision for immersive movie and series discovery.

### Contact
https://movie-fox.zappy5.app/contact
Contact the Movie Fox team for support, feedback, partnership inquiries, or general questions. We're here to help you get the most out of your cinema experience.

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://movie-fox.zappy5.app/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://movie-fox.zappy5.app/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://movie-fox.zappy5.app/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.
